creator: johan@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Since you submitted this PR another PR 28089 
was submitted (committed and closed) which 
added a port (misc/shuffle) for shuffle. 

Do you feel strongly about having shuffle 
in the base system instead of as a port? 

If so I suggest you start a discussion on 
freebsd-arch@freebsd.org and convice people 
it should be in the base system. 

If not, do you mind if I close this PR?
